code: import{useState,useEffect}from'react';import{roomsApi}from'../api/rooms';export function useRoomSchedule(roomId,date){const[data,setData]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(false);const[error,setError]=useState(null);useEffect(()=>{if(!roomId||!date)return;const fetchSchedule=async()=>{setLoading(true);setError(null);try{const schedule=await roomsApi.getSchedule(roomId,date);setData(schedule);}catch(err){setError(err instanceof Error?err:new Error('Failed to fetch schedule'));console.error('[useRoomSchedule] Error:',err);}finally{setLoading(false);}};fetchSchedule();},[roomId,date]);return{data,loading,error};}
